title: Open Cloze: The Great Barrier Reef

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: The Great Barrier Reef is the largest living structure 1.1. _________ Earth. It lies off the coast of Queensland, 1.2. _________ is a state in north-eastern Australia. The reef stretches 1.3. _________ more than 2,300 kilometres and can even 1.4. _________ seen from space. It is not a single reef but a system made 1.5. _________ of thousands of smaller reefs and hundreds of islands. The reef 1.6. _________ home to an enormous variety of life, including colourful fish, turtles and dolphins. Although it looks like rock, the reef 1.7. _________ actually built by tiny animals called coral polyps over millions of years. Today the reef is 1.8. _________ danger because the sea is becoming warmer. When the water gets too hot, the coral loses its colour, a process 1.9. _________ scientists call bleaching. For 1.10. _________ reason, many people are working hard to protect this natural wonder for future generations.
